system.requirement: If you are with your mount companion…

abilities.description: When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.2051538f0c9d5d27]{Heal} your mount companion, or when you make a move to calm or encourage them, the strength of your partnership carrying you both forward; add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit.

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.3ff03b51f620ab26]{Undertake an Expedition} or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ed490d43a2533506]{Set a Course}, you may push your mount companion harder and add +1 (after rolling). If you do, your companion weathers the strain; make the @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.d34cdf2408cd22b6]{Companion Takes a Hit} move [-1].

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.e6ed148eff82c171]{Face Danger} or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.d9208f9b7d827aec]{React Under Fire} in a perilous situation from the saddle, you are one with your mount companion's instincts. If you rely on it, add +their health but count a weak hit as a miss.
